label: GitHub Public Repository
notes: Canonical public source for every published skill.

label: skills.sh
notes: Discovery is repo-driven; optimize compatibility rather than manual submission.

label: agentskills.in
notes: Supports repo indexing and CLI submission patterns.

label: GitHub Discovery Surface
notes: Topics, releases, README SEO, code search, and repository metadata.

label: LobeHub Skills Marketplace
notes: Use browser automation for checks; submission remains semi-automated.

label: AgentSkillsRepo
notes: GitHub repo driven listing with login and review flow.

label: Agent Skill Source
notes: Structured submission with checks and catalog presence.

label: AI Skills Marketplace
notes: Good for high-score batches; admin review expected.

label: mdskills.ai
notes: Login-bound submission target suited to account-backed automation.

label: Terminal Skills
notes: Curated destination for top category leaders only.

label: Agensi
notes: Selective creator marketplace for premium or commercially strong skill families.

label: SkillCreator.ai
notes: Resource layer and newsletter-style amplification, not a bulk listing channel.

label: Awesome Lists and Curated GitHub Indexes
notes: Hand-picked champion skills and benchmark reports only.

label: Community Distribution
notes: Reddit, X, Discord, Hacker News, and newsletter distribution for flagship skill families.
